Customer Description: Owner-operated gravel driveway refresh using tracked Bobcat equipment and AB-3 road base. Delivered, spread, graded, and crowned for a smooth, durable finish. Free quotes. Before & after photos available.
Add-ons: Pothole repair; Edge re-establishment; Light grading
Internal Notes: Typical residential drive 100-250 ft uses 8-18 tons. Confirm tonnage based on width/depth. Margin target 50%. Best Attachment: standard bucket. Typical project 4-8 hrs.

Customer Description: Owner-operated spreading and grading of customer-supplied gravel using tracked Bobcat equipment. Smooth, level finish with proper crown. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Lower-margin work. Only book on small jobs or when paired with other services. Best Attachment: standard bucket.

Customer Description: Targeted pothole repair using compacted AB-3 base. Cleaned, filled, and graded for a durable patch. Tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Bundle 4+ potholes into Pothole Package. Single-pothole minimum $185 due to mobilization. Best Attachment: standard bucket. Typical 1-4 hrs.

Customer Description: Reshape and re-crown an existing gravel drive for proper drainage and a smooth ride. Tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: 2-hr minimum on-site. Most jobs 2-4 hrs. Push gravel-add-on at quote. Best Attachment: standard bucket.

Customer Description: Repair, replace, or extend driveway culverts using tracked Bobcat equipment. Includes excavation, pipe work, backfill, and gravel restoration to keep your driveway draining properly. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Add-ons: Gravel top dressing; Embankment regrade; AB-3 driveway refresh
Internal Notes: Most residential jobs $1,200-$2,500 (12-18 in HDPE, 15-20 ft span). Material pass-through plus 25-35% markup. Half day to full day typical. Best Attachment: standard bucket. Quote Confidence: Low - site visit recommended.

Customer Description: Owner-operated removal of accumulated brush, limbs, and yard debris using tracked Bobcat with grapple. Clean haul-off included. Free quotes. Before & after photos available.
Add-ons: Fence line cleanup; Storm debris removal
Internal Notes: Confirm if customer can burn on-site (rural). Pile size verified on-site; reserve right to re-quote. Best Attachment: grapple. Typical 2-4 hrs.

Customer Description: Owner-operated cleanup of yard debris, fallen limbs, scrap, and accumulated material using tracked Bobcat equipment. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Half-day minimum recommended ($625) unless paired with another service. Best Attachment: grapple.

Customer Description: Rapid-response storm debris cleanup. Tree limb removal, access clearing, debris staging or haul-off using tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated. Free quotes. Before & after photos available.
Add-ons: Small tree removal; Fence line work
Internal Notes: 4-hr minimum. Add 25% emergency surcharge for under 48-hr response. Highest urgency = highest margin. Best Attachment: grapple.

Customer Description: Heavy-duty rotary cutting of tall grass, light brush, and overgrown pasture using tracked Bobcat with brush cutter. Suitable for grass up to 6 ft. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Add-ons: Fence line cleanup; Tree edge cleanup
Internal Notes: Hilly/wet acreage +20%. Best margin: 2+ acre flat jobs. Best Attachment: brush cutter. Typical 30-45 min per acre.

Customer Description: Aggressive brush cutting in dense overgrown areas using tracked Bobcat with heavy-duty cutter attachment. Clears saplings up to 3 in diameter. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Use when acre pricing won't cover density. Always quote site-unseen as range. Best Attachment: brush cutter. Higher minimum due to attachment wear.

Customer Description: Restore fence lines overgrown with brush, vines, and saplings. Cleared to allow fence repair or visibility. Tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated. Free quotes. Before & after photos available.
Add-ons: Brush haul-off; Tree removal at fence corners
Internal Notes: Density-based pricing. Light $4.50/ft, Medium $7.50/ft, Heavy $14/ft. Best Attachment: brush cutter or grapple.

Customer Description: Stump ground to 4-6 in below grade using tracked Bobcat with stump grinder. Chips left on-site or hauled per request. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Add-ons: Chip haul-off; Soil and seed restoration
Internal Notes: Multi-stump discount: 10% off when 5+ stumps booked together; 15% off for 10+. Best Attachment: stump grinder. Typical 15-45 min per stump.

Customer Description: Removal of small trees up to 25 ft tall in accessible locations using tracked Bobcat equipment. Includes felling, sectioning, and stacking or haul-off. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Typical 6-12 in trunk. No tall climbing. Refer to arborist for trees with overhead hazards or near structures. Best Attachment: grapple plus chainsaw.

Customer Description: Surface grading and leveling for yards, pads, lots, and driveway approaches. Tracked Bobcat equipment.
Internal Notes: 4-hr minimum recommended. Add Harley rake premium ($225/hr) for finish work. Best Attachment: standard bucket or Harley rake.

Customer Description: General dirt work including small excavation, fill, leveling, and pad prep using tracked Bobcat equipment.
Internal Notes: Always confirm utility locates (Kansas One-Call) before quoting. Best Attachment: standard bucket. Utility Locate Required.

Customer Description: Project-style correction of standing-water issues - swale shaping, surface drainage, or low-spot fill - using tracked Bobcat equipment.
Add-ons: Material supply; French drain rock; Gravel top dressing
Internal Notes: Secondary service - do not lead residential marketing with this. Walk site before quoting. Avoid jobs requiring engineered designs. Quote Confidence: Low - site visit required.

Customer Description: Demolition and haul-off of sheds, small outbuildings, decks, fences, and accessory structures. Tracked Bobcat equipment.
Internal Notes: Quote on site only. Confirm asbestos-free for pre-1980 structures. Best Attachment: grapple. Quote Confidence: Low.

Customer Description: Removal and haul-off of existing fencing including posts. Tracked Bobcat equipment.
Internal Notes: Concrete-set posts +$3/ft. Barbed wire +$2/ft. Best Attachment: grapple.

Customer Description: Tracked Bobcat skid steer with experienced owner-operator for hourly work. Versatile, productive, and efficient for a wide range of property tasks. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: 2-hr minimum on-site. See attachment matrix for upcharge per attachment.

Customer Description: Half-day tracked Bobcat skid steer service - ideal for medium cleanup, grading, or material spreading projects. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Mobilization included within 25 mi.

Customer Description: Full-day tracked Bobcat skid steer service for larger property projects. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: Best margin. Mobilization included within 25 mi.

Customer Description: Up to 2 brush piles removed, 3 hours tracked Bobcat with grapple, light fence-line touch-up (up to 200 ft), and property debris haul-off (1 trailer load). Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Add-ons: Additional brush piles; Extra fence line
Internal Notes: À la carte $1,650; saves $155. Most popular rural offering.

Customer Description: Up to 12 tons AB-3 delivered and spread, pothole repair (up to 6 holes), light grading and re-crown, edge re-establishment. Tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated. Free quotes. Before & after photos available.
Internal Notes: À la carte $2,250; saves $255. Lead bundle for residential.

Customer Description: Up to 500 linear feet of fence line cleared (medium density), brush haul-off or push-to-burn-pile, corner tree/stump prep (up to 3 stumps under 12 in), 1 hour finish-grade touch-up. Tracked Bobcat equipment.
Add-ons: Additional linear feet; Heavy density upgrade
Internal Notes: À la carte $4,650; saves $400. Project-style sale.

Customer Description: 6 hours tracked Bobcat with grapple, up to 3 brush piles consolidated/removed, 1 small tree removal (up to 12 in trunk, accessible), driveway clearing and access restoration. Owner-operated. Free quotes.
Internal Notes: À la carte $2,150; saves $200. 25% emergency surcharge if booked within 48 hrs of event.

Customer Description: Up to 5 acres rotary mowing, fence-line touch-up (up to 250 ft), one brush pile pushed/cleared. Tracked Bobcat equipment. Owner-operated.
Internal Notes: Recurring revenue base. Schedule visits ~10 weeks apart May-October.

Customer Description: Three scheduled maintenance visits during the May-October season. Each visit includes up to 5 acres mowed, 250 ft fence-line touch-up, and one brush pile cleared. Tracked Bobcat equipment.
Internal Notes: Saves $375 vs per-visit. Collect 1/3 deposit at signing.
